query:
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue,
  (SELECT name FROM customers WHERE externalId = s.customerExternalId) as customerName
FROM services s
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost = 0
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
  AND (
    planName LIKE '%NBN%' OR planName LIKE '%Cellular%' OR planName LIKE '%Acronis%' 
    OR planName LIKE '%Bonder%' OR planName LIKE '%4G%' OR planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
    OR planName LIKE '%TPG%' OR planName LIKE '%Backup%' OR planName LIKE '%Internet%'
    OR planName LIKE '%PremSupport%' OR planName LIKE '%StandSupport%'
  )
ORDER BY planName
LIMIT 50;

  (SELECT name FROM customers WHERE externalId = s.customerExternalId) as customerName
FROM services s
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost = 0
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
  AND (
    planName LIKE '%NBN%' OR planName LIKE '%Cellular%' OR planName LIKE '%Acronis%' 
    OR planName LIKE '%Bonder%' OR planName LIKE '%4G%' OR planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
    OR planName LIKE '%TPG%' OR planName LIKE '%Backup%' OR planName LIKE '%Internet%'
    OR planName LIKE '%PremSupport%' OR planName LIKE '%StandSupport%'
  )
ORDER BY planName
LIMIT 50;
